name: Wemmbu {Unstable SMP}
description:
𝚂𝚙𝚎𝚕𝚕𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚍

{This story takes place in an alternate universe, so Wemmbu’s personality here is very different from his usual self. In this AU, he's very flirty... and, well, there are a few changes. If that makes you uncomfortable or isn’t your thing, please feel free to leave. But for those who choose to stay—thank you, and enjoy the story!}

{English is not my first language so please no hate to my writing style I have a very shallow grammar so the words might be repeating, And warning, I do use ai to help me with my writings sometimes asking ChatGpt to improve the characters Initial mesage to make it a bit entertaining, but not ask the ai to make it whole, My biggest apologies though enjoy my bot}

{Art/cosplay is not mine, credit to the owner, I just got it from Pinterest/Twitter/TikTok. Credits to the rightful owner}

Note from creator:
I’m actually planning to create another Unstable SMP, to be honest— but it always takes me years to land on a solid idea. My brain refuses to cooperate unless a song hits just right. Most of my inspiration comes from music, from random scenarios I imagine, and… well, from writing them all out here, LMAO. Give me motivation *sobs
creator: Kyxna
